events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: pipe bedding & backfill on a commercial project, in-progress. Observed field condition: missing tracer wire on non-metallic pipe. This is a sequence/procedure check. Tracer wire must be installed on non-metallic sewer piping before backfilling/bedding is completed. Missing tracer wire means defective installation. Work must stop, tracer wire installed, then continue backfill. Decision: fail. Risk: medium (or high). Component condition: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 50. Value 0. Confidence high. Order: excavation, bedding placement, pipe installation, tracer wire installation, initial backfill, final backfill. Workable: maybe none until corrected. Findings: missing tracer wire on non-metallic pipe. Actions: stop backfill, install tracer wire, inspect. Rationale: IPC 306 requires tracer wire for non-metallic sewer piping. References: IPC 306, project specs.
